channel.title: GraphiQuestor – Macro Intelligence Feed
channel.description: Latest macro signals, liquidity regimes, sovereign stress markers, and geo-economic intelligence from GraphiQuestor observatory.

item.title: US Debt Maturity Wall — Live Analysis
item.description: Analysis of the $9.2 trillion Treasury rollover cycle and its impact on institutional interest expense in 2026.

item.title: Global Net Liquidity Pulse — Regime Signal
item.description: Fed balance sheet, TGA, and RRP dynamics showing the current impulse for global risk assets.

item.title: India Macro Pulse — MoSPI Real-Time Telemetry
item.description: Institutional-grade tracking of India's CPI, IIP, and Credit growth using official MoSPI data sources.

item.title: The Debt/Gold Ratio: Why It Matters for Monetary Sovereignty in 2026
item.description: An institutional-grade analysis of sovereign debt burdens relative to gold reserves.
